governance.mutation_pipeline: OperationIntent -> PatchPlan -> Review/Policy -> Apply -> Verify -> AuditReceipt
governance.adapter_boundary: fe_reader_core remains pure; platform, UI, renderer, MCP, plugin and web surfaces use adapters.
governance.release_policy: Signing, notarization, store submission and external registry publication are evidence-gated external gates.
governance.claim_policy: A platform parity claim is allowed only when this matrix records supported evidence or an explicit limitation.

capabilities.summary: Open a user-granted local PDF without uploading document bytes.

windows.limitation: Windows has CLI install and packaging surfaces, but no public-quality reader shell yet.

linux.limitation: Linux has container/package evidence, but no public-quality reader shell yet.

android.limitation: Android has intent and UniFFI smoke coverage, but no shipped reader shell yet.

ios.limitation: iOS has App Intents and UniFFI smoke coverage, but no shipped reader shell yet.

web_local_pwa.limitation: Web local file access remains contract-only until a PWA shell lands.

browser_extension.limitation: Browser extension handoff remains contract-only until an extension shell lands.

capabilities.summary: Navigate pages, zoom or fit, and run deterministic in-document search.

windows.limitation: Windows navigation/search needs desktop shell implementation.

linux.limitation: Linux navigation/search needs desktop shell implementation.

android.limitation: Android navigation/search needs native wrapper implementation.

ios.limitation: iOS navigation/search needs native wrapper implementation.

web_local_pwa.limitation: PWA navigation/search needs web shell implementation.

browser_extension.limitation: Browser extension should inspect or hand off PDFs, not become the full reader by default.

capabilities.summary: Expose metadata/hash inspection, validation, and accessibility diagnostics.

windows.limitation: Windows diagnostics need desktop shell wiring.

linux.limitation: Linux diagnostics need desktop shell wiring.

android.limitation: Android diagnostics need native wrapper UI evidence.

ios.limitation: iOS diagnostics need native wrapper UI evidence.

browser_extension.limitation: Browser extension diagnostics are limited to inspect/handoff.

capabilities.summary: Expose annotations, forms, page organization, redaction, and conversion as plan-only workflows.

macos.limitation: macOS exposes workflow planning boundaries but not direct apply shortcuts.

windows.limitation: Windows workflow planning needs shell and COM adapter wiring.

linux.limitation: Linux workflow planning needs shell and D-Bus adapter wiring.

android.limitation: Android workflow planning needs native wrapper UI evidence.

ios.limitation: iOS workflow planning needs native wrapper UI evidence.

web_local_pwa.limitation: PWA workflow planning must remain user-granted and plan-only until approval UI lands.

browser_extension.limitation: Browser extension workflow planning must not mutate local files directly.

capabilities.summary: Apply one approved low-risk workflow through the full mutation pipeline with audit receipt evidence.

macos.limitation: Apply/save is intentionally gated until end-to-end receipts are verified.

windows.limitation: Windows apply must wait for shared approved-plan facade and receipt wiring.

linux.limitation: Linux apply must wait for shared approved-plan facade and receipt wiring.

android.limitation: Android apply must wait for shared approved-plan facade and receipt wiring.

ios.limitation: iOS apply must wait for shared approved-plan facade and receipt wiring.

web_local_pwa.limitation: Web apply requires explicit user approval and no hidden persistence.

browser_extension.limitation: Browser extension direct apply remains out of scope; it may hand off approved plans.

capabilities.summary: Produce buildable platform artifacts and checksums where credentials are unavailable.

macos.external_gate: Signed and notarized DMG or app bundle required for public release.

windows.external_gate: Signed MSI/MSIX or portable artifact plus checksum required.

linux.external_gate: Built AppImage, Flatpak, Snap or distro artifact plus review required.

android.external_gate: Signed AAB/APK and Play or F-Droid evidence required.

ios.external_gate: Apple Developer Program, signed archive, TestFlight or App Store evidence required.

web_local_pwa.limitation: PWA artifact build and hosting evidence are not present yet.

browser_extension.limitation: Extension package and store evidence are not present yet.
